NAVAREA XIX 77/13
1.RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 181830 UTC AUG 13. 
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
    73-27.6N 024-24.1E LEIV ERIKSSON
    72-19.3N 019-35.3E WEST HERCULES
    71-54.2N 020-16.2E TRANSOCEAN ARCTIC       
    70-50.5N 016-33.3E SCARABEO 8              
    66-58,9N 008-23.1E TRANSOCEAN WINNER
    66-14.5N 008-19.6E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN 
    66-05.3N 008-16.7E SONGA TRYM (NEW POSITION)
    65-44.1N 007-39.1E POLAR PIONEER
    65-15.1N 006-54.5E TRANSOCEAN LEADER 
    65-07.1N 006-40.5E DEEPSEA BERGEN
NOTES:
    A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
    B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 69/13
